Priority touch-up list

  • **SPINE_GAP** (65 co's) — Tier-2 strike list; see `funding_round_gaps_targets_*.jsonl`. Highest signal-to-effort.
  • **ALL_UNKNOWN_DATES** (80 co's) — Dataminr-class. Wikipedia / press archive likely to yield month-precision.
  • **BOTH_GAPS** (71 co's) — needs full re-source on at least one round.
  • **DATE_GAPS** (15 co's) — anchor exists (amount); date-precision agent run.
  • **264 non-USD rounds** awaiting FX table (task #62) to canonicalize amount_usd_millions.
  • **NO_ROUNDS triage** (267 co's) — most are legit products/divisions/bootstrapped (see `_classify_no_rounds.py`).
